title: erianthus articulatus
intro: Erianthus articulatus, also known as the joint grass or jointed grass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Erianthus articulatus is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and utilize its health benefits.
